description: Git-versioned tool forge with unified execution API

tools.name: forge_write
tools.description: Write a new tool script into the forge. The script must be a valid ES module exporting a default async function. Returns the tool name and initial version.

name.description: Unique tool name (kebab-case or snake_case). Used as filename and API identifier.

code.description: Full source code of the tool. Must export `export default async function(args, context)` where context contains { gateway, fetchPayload, progress, vaultPath }

description.description: Short description of what this tool does

tools.name: forge_update
tools.description: Update an existing tool with new code. Creates a new git commit. The old version remains in history.

name.description: Name of the existing tool to update

code.description: New source code to replace the current version

message.description: Git commit message describing the change

tools.name: forge_read
tools.description: Read the source code of a tool. Optionally specify a git ref (commit hash, tag, or branch) to read a historical version. Defaults to HEAD.

ref.description: Git ref to read from (commit hash, tag, branch). Omit for latest version.

tools.name: forge_list
tools.description: List all tools in the forge with metadata (description, last modified, commit count).

tools.name: forge_delete
tools.description: Delete a tool from the forge. The file is removed and a deletion commit is made. History is preserved in git.

tools.name: forge_call
tools.description: Execute a forged tool by name. Accepts an options object and a payload array. Each payload item is resolved to a Buffer: local paths are read from disk, UNC paths from network, URLs are fetched. Progress is reported during execution. Default timeout is 5 minutes.

options.description: Arbitrary options object passed to the tool as `args`

payload.description: Array of payload items. Each item is a string: local absolute path, UNC path, or HTTP(S) URL. Resolved to Buffer and passed to the tool.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds. Default: 300000 (5 minutes). Max: 600000 (10 minutes).

tools.name: forge_history
tools.description: Show git history for a tool (or all tools if name omitted). Returns commit hash, message, timestamp, and author.

name.description: Tool name to show history for. Omit for all commits.

limit.description: Max number of commits to return. Default: 20

tools.name: forge_rollback
tools.description: Rollback a tool to a specific git commit. Creates a new commit that restores the file to that version (does not rewrite history).
